kitchen.intro: Share the important parts of your kitchen project in a few guided steps so local professionals can understand the job before they contact you.
microcopy: Better details can lead to better first responses
whatHappensNext: Your request is reviewed so the scope, timing, and location are already clearer before anyone reaches out.
Matched local professionals may contact you with more useful next steps instead of basic qualifying questions.
You stay in control of how professionals contact you and there is no obligation to hire.
kitchen.descriptionPrompt: Anything else local professionals should know?
kitchen.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: We want to keep the current footprint, replace cabinets and countertops, update lighting, and refresh the backsplash.

steps.title: What best describes your kitchen project?
steps.help: Pick the option that feels closest. You do not need to have every detail figured out yet.

steps.title: Which parts of the kitchen are involved?
steps.help: Select all that apply. This helps local professionals understand the scope faster.

steps.title: Will the project involve moving plumbing, electrical, or walls?
steps.help: We only ask this when layout changes are part of the project because it can affect complexity and scheduling.

steps.title: About how large is the kitchen?
steps.help: A simple size estimate is enough. Exact measurements are not required.

steps.title: When would you like to get started?
steps.help: Choose the timeline that feels closest. You can also add a short note if there is something important local professionals should know.

steps.title: Add photos if you have them
steps.help: Photos help local professionals understand the project faster and may reduce follow-up questions.

steps.title: Where is the project located?
steps.help: We ask for location before contact information so the request can be routed locally.

steps.title: Where should local professionals contact you?
steps.help: No obligation. No spam blast. Your request is only used to connect you with relevant local professionals.

cleaning.intro: This shorter request keeps things simple while still giving local professionals enough detail to understand the job.
whatHappensNext: Your request is reviewed based on service type, timing, and location.
Matched local professionals can see the basics before they contact you.
You stay in control of how providers contact you.
cleaning.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: Move-out clean, pet hair, or extra attention needed in bathrooms and kitchen.

steps.title: What type of cleaning do you need?
steps.help: Choose the option that feels closest. This helps keep the request short and relevant.

steps.title: How often do you need cleaning?
steps.help: A quick answer helps providers understand whether this is a one-time job or ongoing service.

steps.title: About how large is the home?
steps.help: This does not need to be exact. A simple estimate is enough.

steps.title: Anything important we should know?
steps.help: Optional. Add a short note only if there is something useful to mention.

steps.title: Where is the property located?
steps.help: We ask for location so the request can be routed locally.

steps.title: Where should local professionals contact you?
steps.help: No obligation. No spam blast. Your request is only used to connect you with relevant local professionals.

standard.intro: Choose the service, share a few project details, and we'll help connect you with relevant local professionals in the Tampa Bay area.
whatHappensNext: Your request is reviewed by service type, timing, and location.
Matched local professionals can understand the basics before they contact you.
You stay in control and there is no obligation to hire.
standard.descriptionPrompt: Tell us a little about the project.
standard.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: Need a repair, installation, replacement, or help with a new project.

steps.title: What service do you need?
steps.help: Choose the service that feels closest to the work you need.

steps.title: What do you need help with?
steps.help: Pick the option that feels closest. This helps keep the request simple.

steps.title: Tell us a little about the project.
steps.help: A short description helps local professionals understand the job before they contact you.

steps.title: When would you like to get started?
steps.help: Choose the timeline that feels closest.

steps.title: Where is the project located?
steps.help: We ask for location so the request can be routed locally.

steps.title: Where should local professionals contact you?
steps.help: No obligation. No spam blast. Your request is only used to connect you with relevant local professionals.
